headline: We're Glad You Found Us
subtext: Awaken Church launched in January 2022 in Cartersville, GA with one mission — to help people Know God, Find Freedom, and Live On Purpose.

story.headline: A Church Family, Not a Corporation
story.body: We're an ARC/CMN-affiliated church plant in Bartow County averaging around 180 people across two Sunday services. We believe church should feel like family — a place where everyone has a name, not a number.

pastors.bio: Tyler and Kayla planted Awaken Church in 2022 with a heart for Bartow County and a conviction that the local church is the hope of the world.
